title: lgwks.artifact.tokenized.v1
description: Canonical tokenized artifact envelope. Every lgwks output (research, run, ingest, substrate, daemon_event, project_artifact) is emitted as one artifact on the Causal Tape; vector, graph, FTS, and relational tables are projections over these artifacts. The tokenization_id links the artifact to a registered tokenizer/analyzer, making the DB tokenizer-aware.

artifact_cid.description: Content-addressed identifier for the canonical artifact bytes (b2b256)

tokenization_id.description: Reference to a registered tokenizer/analyzer (e.g. word_regex:v1 or aetherius:v0)

payload_cid.description: Content-addressed identifier for the raw payload bytes

payload_meta.description: Human-readable lineage: title, url, position, parent doc, mime, etc.

timestamp.description: Seconds since epoch when the artifact was produced

prev_hash.description: Previous tape entry hash; genesis for the first artifact in a tenant chain
